<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="4.0.2-Norrköping">
  <identifier></identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language></language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title></title>
  <abstract></abstract>
  <links/>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["SIRGAS-ROU98 / UTM zone 21S",BASEGEOGCRS["SIRGAS-ROU98",DATUM["SIRGAS-ROU98",ELLIPSOID["WGS 84",6378137,298.257223563,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],ID["EPSG",5381]],CONVERSION["UTM zone 21S",METHOD["Transverse Mercator",ID["EPSG",9807]],PARAMETER["Latitude of natural origin",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8801]],PARAMETER["Longitude of natural origin",-57,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8802]],PARAMETER["Scale factor at natural origin",0.9996,SCALEUNIT["unity",1],ID["EPSG",8805]],PARAMETER["False easting",500000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8806]],PARAMETER["False northing",10000000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8807]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["(E)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],AXIS["(N)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],USAGE[SCOPE["Engineering survey, topographic mapping."],AREA["Uruguay - west of 54°W, onshore and offshore."],BBOX[-36.63,-58.49,-30.09,-54]],ID["EPSG",5382]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=utm +zone=21 +south +ellps=WGS84 +towgs84=0,0,0,0,0,0,0 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>28133</srsid>
      <srid>5382</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:5382</authid>
      <description>SIRGAS-ROU98 / UTM zone 21S</description>
      <projectionacronym>utm</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7030</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent/>
</qgis>
